title: Senior Radiologist at Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd!
